stories.headline: McCormick CEO Explains Unilever Deal
stories.summary:
McCormick CEO Brendan Foley joins Bloomberg Open Interest to break down the company’s move to acquire Unilever’s food business, revealing a strategy centered on global scale, flavor innovation, and supply chain control. He explains how McCormick plans to outcompete private labels, tap into wellness trends, and build a dominant “flavor powerhouse” through both acquisitions and in-house innovation.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Get Used to Stocks Grinding Lower and Gapping Higher Under Trump

stories.headline: Oil Markets Reality vs Expectations
stories.summary: Oil markets are fluctuating between reality and expectations as disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz choke global supply. Bloomberg's oil markets reporter Mia Gindis joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down why physical oil prices remain high despite falling futures, and how geopolitical outcomes could send prices anywhere from $90 to well above $100 per barrel. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: US Oil Exports to Hit 5 Million Barrels a Day Amid Global Crunch

stories.headline: U.S. Fertility Rates Drop to Another Record Low
